channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping, 1st July
item.description:
Fly tipping - seems to be a regular occurrence at this location!!!!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lincoln Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Remove the hostile fencing trapping in greenery and accumulating litter, 1st July
item.description:
Reached out so many times.. this fencing is pointless.. just locks people away from green space.. makes the street hostile, squeezes communities to gather on therefore obstruct pavements. Remove fencing, clean up Clarence Rd. min x4 a day!!!!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clarence Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Voi bike in oark, 1st July
item.description:
Voi bike abandoned in Cator Park Beckenham. Next to bridge over The Beck. Been there about a week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bailes Place, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Disgusting litter filled streets every day all day, 1st July
item.description:
I simply don’t understand how a borough with so much potential can let its cultural centre fall into this state. Disgusting. Teach communities to respect public spaces, quadruple cleaning pick ups from bottom of Narrow Lane to top of Clarence Rd. Clean up.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dalston Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip on grass LBB land next to 7-10 Devon House SE20 8LQ, 1st July
item.description:
Please remove the dumped rubbish on the grass area which is LBB land next to 7-10 Devon House. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hawthorn Grove, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox on pavement, 1st July
item.description:
There is a dead fox on the pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westwood Hill, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Walkway connecting granville road, 1st July
item.description:
Extensive flight tipping opposite the pocket park

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Granville Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)

item.title: Street light not working, 1st July
item.description:
Ref: 9697597 You advise no action required but the street light located on the green in Broadoaks Way opposite nos. 39 and 40 is not working. The light was knocked out in an RTC and replaced but it has not worked since then
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 58, Pickhurst Park, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road surface worn away, 1st July
item.description:
Tarmac on road surface worn away and concrete below is crumbling. Also numerous kerbstones in this area are loose or broken.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14;15, Paddock Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 1st July
item.description:
Email received by CSC inbox 01/07/26 08:28 Fly-tipping Lat/Long - 51.4241583, -0.0381521 what3words - spark.famous.dawn Nearest address - Flat 56, Lucas Court, Winchfield Road, London, SE26 5TL 7 Black sacks of insulation material dumped Reference - 5685939 Map link - open Google map Report history - Status: Received 01/07/2026 08:28 7 Black sacks of insulation material dumped
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent House Lane, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Manhole cover, 1st July
item.description:
Broken Manhole cover
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tudor Way, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several bags of green waste and a bookcase, 1st July
item.description:
Several bags of green waste and a bookcase dumped in the usual place

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glengall Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stinging nettles, 1st July
item.description:
Stinging nettles encroaching the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16;17, Paddock Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This whole road next to the school needs clearing, lots of rubbish along it, 1st July
item.description:
This whole road next to the school needs clearing, lots of rubbish along it
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tillingbourne Green, Poverest, Greater London

item.title: Bag of rubbish emptied on green, 1st July

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 68, Sherborne Road, Poverest, Greater London

item.title: Rubbish dumped by tree, 1st July
item.description:
Rubbish dumped by tree
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Brockwell Close, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The bottom of the trees need trimming, 1st July
item.description:
The bottom of the trees need trimming. There’s gonna be a dangerous accident because people cannot see Driving off their driveways. It’s blocking the path and they have sharp needles on them.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 188, Hurst Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti tags on Thames Path, 1st July
item.description:
Hello, These tags have been on the Thames Path for some time, please could they be removed? Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hoskins Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 severely overgrown trees on Hurst Road on both sides of the junction of Chaucer Road, 1st July
item.description:
2 severely overgrown trees on Hurst Road on both sides of the junction of Chaucer Road. both trees are blocking the visuals of drivers who are pulling out of Chaucer Road onto Hurst Road. Resident concerned it may cause an accident. The leaves are growing around and out of the trunk - please can this be looked into asap
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 216, Hurst Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Discarded Lime bike, no handle bars, 1st July
item.description:
Lime bike with no handle bars discarded to side of path - fed up seeing these all over the park, there needs to be fines for the last user then users may be inclined to leave them somewhere appropriate and safe.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckenham Place Park, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
